header.title: Duplicate Therapy Check
header.subtitle: Detect duplicate therapy by mechanism / class / route across the patient's current inpatient list, or a manual list

patientPicker.label: Patient
patientPicker.placeholder: Select a patient (or leave blank for manual mode)

patientResult.title: Patient Duplicate Therapy Check
patientResult.description: Includes inpatient meds + outpatient self-supplied / external; runs L1 / L2 / L3 / L4 duplicate detection
patientResult.errorMessage: Duplicate therapy service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
patientResult.tooFew: Fewer than {{min}} medications in scope; cannot run duplicate detection.

manual.title: Manual Drug List
manual.description: Enter at least {{min}} drugs (up to {{max}}); the system compares ATC + mechanism. No patient required.

errors.checkFailed: Duplicate detection failed. Please try again later.

header.title: Dosage Calculator
header.subtitle: ICU PAD drug infusion rate calculator (with obesity-adjusted dosing weight)

card.title: PAD Drug Dosage Calculation
card.description: Select a drug, enter weight and target dose; the system calculates infusion rate (ml/hr)

dosage.fixedAlert: {{label}} is a fixed-dose drug (not weight-dependent). Recommended dose: {{range}}. No target dose / concentration needed.

header.title: Drug Interactions
header.subtitle: Look up drug-drug interactions (DDI) sorted by risk level

drugCard.title: Drug Selection
drugCard.description: Select at least two drugs; the system checks all pairwise interactions

validation.needTwo: Please select at least two different drugs
validation.queryError: Query failed. Please verify the backend service is running.

sourceToast.noLiterature: This entry has no literature source provided

results.noDataAlt: No matching drug interaction data. Please verify drug names.
results.aiNote: Results inferred by AI based on pharmacological mechanism; prefer database results when available
results.dbNote: Results from drug interaction database (Lexi-Interact derived + ICU supplementary mapping)

header.title: Drug Library
header.subtitle: Overview of all drugs and interaction rules · For pharmacists / admins

search.placeholder: Search generic / brand / hospital code / ATC

header.title: Proposal Review
header.subtitle: Pharmacist-submitted hospital override proposals, signed off by admin (4-eye)

proposals.noAccess: Only admin role can access this page

approveDialog.title: Approve Proposal
approveDialog.description: "{{a}} × {{b}}" risk will be overridden from {{from}} to {{to}}
approveDialog.selfBlock: ⚠ Cannot approve your own proposal (4-eye sign-off)
approveDialog.commentPlaceholder: (Optional) Approval note: e.g. agree with this SOP, annual review

rejectDialog.title: Reject Proposal
rejectDialog.description: Rejection reason will be stored in audit log (≥10 chars)
rejectDialog.placeholder: e.g. Insufficient evidence; please add PMID and resubmit

detail.notePlaceholder: e.g. Hospital consensus: do not warn for SAH patients on Aspirin + Warfarin per Neuro 2024 SOP

proposeDialog.title: Propose Hospital Override
proposeDialog.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. Per hospital Neuro 2024 consensus, SAH patient on strict BP monitoring may use this combo...
proposeDialog.citationLabel: Evidence citation (≥10 chars — PMID / UpToDate / hospital SOP number)
proposeDialog.citationPlaceholder: e.g. PMID:32887891; hospital SOP-NEU-2024-03; UpToDate Vasopressors topic

deprecateDialog.title: Mark deprecated
deprecateDialog.successToast: Marked deprecated (will disappear from list after reload)
deprecateDialog.placeholder: e.g. Lexicomp 2026.07 retracted this rule; hospital Neuro SOP no longer applies

gap.title: Data gap notice:
gap.body: Absence of a rule ≠ safety. This system mainly sources Lexicomp + MICROMEDEX; rare combinations, herbs, or food interactions may not be covered. IV compatibility is primarily from Trissel's Handbook; consult Pharmacy for unlisted combinations.

page.noDdi: No interaction rules recorded for this drug

iv.noData: No IV compatibility data recorded for this drug

proposeRules.afterApproval: . Requires admin approval (4-eye sign-off) before taking effect.
proposeRules.xDowngradeBlocked: X (Avoid combination) downgrade is permanently forbidden (X may only stay X)

deprecateExtra.description: Rule "× {{label}}" will be soft-deleted (is_active = FALSE). All pharmacist queries and APIs will no longer return it. Can be restored at any time. Reason required (≥30 chars, stored in audit log).

history.subtitle: All edit history for {{ruleId}} (max 200 entries, newest first)

header.title: IV Compatibility
header.subtitle: Y-Site IV co-administration compatibility lookup (multi-drug matrix supported)

card.title: Drug Selection
card.description: Select at least two IV drugs; the system queries all pairwise Y-Site compatibility

patientPicker.placeholder: Select patient to autofill IV meds (optional)
patientPicker.noIVMeds: Patient has no comparable IV medications

validation.needTwo: Please select at least two different drugs

results.noData: No matching Y-Site compatibility data found. Recommend separate infusion lines.
results.sourceNote: Source: Yangming campus Y-site compatibility data (8 ICU departments)
